task:
Open the local signup form at file:///home/user/Documents/signup.html and submit it with these exact values:
- Username: alice_builder
- Email: alice@builder.dev
- Password: SuperSecret42
- Confirm Password: SuperSecret42

The page's JavaScript validates that all fields are non-empty, the password is at least 8 chars, and confirm matches password; on success it writes a welcome message into the #result element. After submission, the #result element must be visible and must contain the text 'Welcome, alice_builder'. Leave the tab on file:///home/user/Documents/signup.html with the success message visible.
